✨ May Allah accept your Umrah, Shereen ✨

"My Love, I see how hard you've been working — the long days, the weight you carry so quietly. But Allah did not forget you. He is calling you to His house. Soon you will stand before the Kaaba, and none of that stress will matter anymore. Let it all go there. You deserve this more than anyone. We are going together, InshaAllah, and I will be right beside you."

Makkah al-Mukarramah
LIVE FROM MASJID AL-HARAM
